title: Player Golems
description: Copper Golems now look just like your friends!...If you name them like your friends!
body:
This mod was made for OBS2 server


Ever wanted your base to feel alive with your REAL friends running around?? Then let me introduce you to... 
# PLAYER GOLEMS! ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡


Turn those rusty little guys into your besties! This simple mod adds a easy-to-use way to personalize your Copper Golems using **any player skin** available, and I mean **every**! (o^<)

All you need is a Name Tag. Just type in your friend's username, click the golem, and watch them transform!

## Let's get your friends moving! ( ദ്ദി ˙ᗜ˙ )

| Rename Name Tag in Anvil | Use it on your Copper Golem! | Yippe Friend! |
|--------------------------|------------------------------|-------------------------|
|![Rename Tag](https://i.imgur.com/Xu2cNy2.gif)|![Use it on Golem](https://i.imgur.com/vHUGbmy.gif)|![Yippe!](https://i.imgur.com/Kf4m45R.gif)|

---

### Features:
* **Automatic Skin Fetching:** Works with any valid Java Edition username! 
* **Safe for Multiplayer:** Works on any server without needing the mod installed on the server-side!
* **Instant Update:** No restart required, just name and go.

### Commands:
* `/playergolem reload <player_name>` — Refreshes a specific skin (useful if your friend changed their outfit!).
* `/playergolem reload` — Force a refresh for every copper friend currently in the world.

### TODO:
* Make Models work with Copper Golem Statue...
